---
title: "Performance evaluation of a new dosimetric system for lens dosimetry made using 3D printing"
date: 2025-07-01
author:
  - name: Nascimento, G.G.
  - name: Rodrigues, O.
  - name: Savi, M.
  - name: Villani, D.
  - name: Potiens, M.P.A.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Radiation Physics and Chemistry"
  volume: 232
  doi: "10.1016/j.radphyschem.2025.112701"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Performance evaluation of a new dosimetric system for lens dosimetry made using 3D printing</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
